base_url.description: WooCommerce store REST API base URL, e.g. https://example.com/wp-json/wc/v3. See Known limits: legacy's shop-derived base URL is not modeled; pass the full wc/v3 base URL directly.

api_key.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer key. Sent as the HTTP Basic auth username; never logged.

api_secret.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer secret. Sent as the HTTP Basic auth password; never logged.

start_date.description: ISO8601 or YYYY-MM-DD lower bound; only objects modified at or after this time are read (modified_after).

page_size.description: Records per page (1-100), sent as per_page.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.
